title: Spa Escape Weekend
subtitle: Escape to tranquility with our Spa Escape Weekend. Enjoy two luxurious nights in one of our suites, complete with spa access and a 60-minute spa treatment for two. Perfect for a relaxing getaway with your loved one.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
description: Escape to tranquility with our **Spa Escape Weekend**. Enjoy two luxurious nights in one of our suites, complete with spa access and a 60-minute spa treatment for two. Perfect for a relaxing getaway with your loved one.
terms: Offer valid for stays until 30 December.
Subject to availability.
60-minute spa treatment included per guest.
Additional spa treatments available at an extra charge.

title: Late Check-out Treat
subtitle: Enjoy the luxury of extended relaxation with our Late Check-out Treat. On selected days, enjoy complimentary late check-out until 3:00 PM, giving you extra time to relax before you head home.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
description: Enjoy the luxury of **extended relaxation** with our **Late Check-out Treat**. On selected days, enjoy complimentary late check-out until 3:00 PM, giving you extra time to relax before you head home.
terms: Late check-out is available on Sundays only.
Subject to availability, must be requested at check-in.
Only available for stays booked directly through the hotel.

title: Welcome Drink Invite
subtitle: Start your stay with a refreshing Welcome Drink at our lobby bar. Each guest will be treated to a drink of your choice to enjoy as you relax and begin your stay.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
validUntil: For stays of 2 nights or more
description: Start your stay with a refreshing **Welcome Drink** at our lobby bar. Upon arrival, each guest will be treated to a drink of your choice to enjoy as you relax and begin your stay.
terms: Offer valid only for stays of 2 nights or more.
Drink selection available upon arrival.
Must be redeemed on the arrival day.

title: Date Night Dinner
subtitle: Make your evening unforgettable with a romantic Date Night Dinner. Enjoy a three-course meal for two, accompanied by a glass of wine each, while taking in beautiful views from our rooftop restaurant.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
description: Make your evening unforgettable with a **romantic Date Night Dinner**. Enjoy a three-course meal for two, accompanied by a glass of wine each, while taking in the beautiful views from our rooftop restaurant.
terms: Valid only on Friday to Sunday evenings.
Reservations required 24 hours in advance.
Menu selection available upon booking.

title: Family Stay Upgrade
subtitle: Enjoy a family-friendly stay with our Family Stay Upgrade. This offer includes a special rate for family rooms, with breakfast for two adults and up to two children included in your stay.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
description: Enjoy a family-friendly stay with our **Family Stay Upgrade**. This offer includes a special rate for family rooms, with breakfast for two adults and up to two children included in your stay.
terms: Available for selected school holiday periods only.
Family room must be booked for at least 2 adults and 1 child.
Additional children can be added for an extra charge.

title: Bike & Explore Package
subtitle: Explore the city like a local with our Bike & Explore Package. Book 3 or more nights and enjoy a full day of bicycle use to explore the area at your own pace.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
description: Explore the city like a local with our **Bike & Explore Package**. Book 3 or more nights and enjoy a full day of bicycle use to explore the area at your own pace.
terms: Valid for bookings of 3 or more nights.
Bicycle rental must be reserved in advance.
Available throughout the year.

title: Birthday Surprise
subtitle: Celebrate in style with a Birthday Surprise. Enjoy a complimentary dessert and a small gift during dinner on your birthday or stay dates around it.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
validUntil: On your birthday or stay dates around it (ID required)
description: Celebrate in style with a **Birthday Surprise**. Enjoy a complimentary dessert and a small gift during dinner on your birthday or stay dates around it.
terms: Valid for birthday stays or dates within a week before or after your birthday.
ID required for verification.
Dessert and gift available during dinner only.

title: Business Stay Advantage
subtitle: Take advantage of our Business Stay Advantage offer with a preferential rate for business travelers. Enjoy early check-in, a daily pressed shirt, and a discount on meeting room bookings.
hint: Show this code at the reception during check-in
description: Take advantage of our **Business Stay Advantage** offer with a preferential rate for business travelers. Enjoy early check-in, a daily pressed shirt, and a discount on meeting room bookings.
terms: Valid for stays Monday to Thursday.
Early check-in available upon request.
One shirt pressed per day included.
Meeting room discount based on availability.
